runtimeNotes: The active PNG atlas covers track parts with transparent sprites, exposes hull as sprite.hull, turret/coax as sprite.turret, and main cannon as sprite.barrel. The barrel sprite uses tintSlot team, matching the hull's full owner-color tint while preserving part.barrel recoil. The generated barrel cell was flipped horizontally before atlas writing so the runtime pivot and muzzle orientation match the SVG rig.
notes: Regenerated from the separated 2x3 no-track sheet with the attached top-down Tiger I reference used only for silhouette guidance. This pass asks for less detail, a non-perfect-rectangular stepped/chamfered hull, black RTS-readable outlines, and a full team-tinted barrel. Not final art: inspect the side armor blocks in-game because they may still read like track guards.
